name: Rusty Sword
description: A battered but serviceable blade.

name: Health Potion
description: Restores 20 HP.

name: Mana Potion
description: Restores 15 MP.

name: Iron Sword
description: A sturdy iron blade.

name: Leather Armor
description: Basic leather protection.

name: Wooden Shield
description: A simple wooden shield. Better than nothing.

name: Scroll of Fireball
description: Unleashes a ball of fire upon use.

name: Steel Longsword
description: A well-crafted steel blade with keen edges.

name: Chainmail
description: Interlocking metal rings provide solid defense.

name: Greater Healing Salve
description: A potent salve that restores 40 HP.

name: Ring of Protection
description: A silver ring that shimmers with protective magic.

name: Venom Dagger
description: A dagger with a hollow blade that weeps poison.

name: Scroll of Healing
description: A parchment inscribed with healing prayers.

name: Amulet of Strength
description: Grants the wearer increased physical power.

name: Cloak of Shadows
description: A dark cloak that seems to absorb light.

name: Flame Tongue
description: A sword wreathed in magical fire.

name: Plate Armor
description: Full plate armor forged by master smiths.

name: Elixir of Life
description: A glowing elixir that restores 80 HP.

name: Scroll of Chain Lightning
description: Arcs of lightning strike all enemies.

name: Boots of Speed
description: Enchanted boots that quicken the wearer's movements.

name: Holy Warhammer
description: A blessed weapon effective against undead.

name: Mithril Chainmail
description: Lightweight yet incredibly strong mithril armor.

name: Ring of Wizardry
description: A ring that enhances arcane ability.

name: Vorpal Blade
description: Snicker-snack! A blade of legendary sharpness.

name: Dragon Scale Armor
description: Armor crafted from the scales of a slain dragon.

name: Scroll of Meteor Swarm
description: Calls down a shower of fiery meteors.

name: Phoenix Tears
description: Fully restores HP. Can revive from death.

name: Crown of Wisdom
description: A circlet that grants profound insight.

name: Shadow Dagger
description: A blade that strikes from the darkness between moments.

name: Adamantine Plate
description: Nearly indestructible armor forged from adamantine.

name: Amulet of the Ages
description: An ancient amulet imbued with timeless power.

name: Soul Reaver
description: A cursed blade that devours the souls of the slain.

name: Godplate
description: Armor blessed by the gods themselves.

name: Scroll of Wish
description: A scroll containing the most powerful spell known.

name: Ring of Three Wishes
description: A legendary ring that grants its wearer extraordinary power.

name: Staff of the Archmage
description: The staff of a legendary archmage, crackling with power.

name: Potion of Giant Strength
description: Grants immense strength for one combat.

name: Scroll of Shield
description: Creates a temporary magical barrier.

name: Iron Helm
description: A simple iron helmet.

name: Hand Axe
description: A short-handled axe suitable for combat.

name: Mace of Disruption
description: Blazes with radiant energy, devastating to undead.
